title: Hyperspectral Imaging: Beyond RGB Computer Vision
author: Prism Lee
Spectral Imaging Scientist
description: Analyze hundreds of spectral bands—but computational cost is prohibitive
content:
Hyperspectral imaging captures hundreds of narrow spectral bands for material identification.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Spectral Overload (2040)](/docs/articles/spectral-overload-2040)
